prospects.bio: Hello! I’m Kemily Kaizer Hanson, a certified Speech and Language Therapist dedicated to helping children and adults overcome communication challenges and express themselves with confidence. Whether your child struggles with pronunciation, comprehension, or social communication, or you’re an adult seeking to improve clarity and voice projection — I provide personalized therapy tailored to each client’s unique needs.
